preconditions: Verify the Home page is loaded in guest state.
Verify the user is unauthenticated before starting the workflow.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can open the Login page from the Home page using the person/profile button
steps: Open http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state without authenticated user identity visible.
Click the person/profile button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the guest Home page to the Login page and the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible and enabled.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and interactive after opening from Home page
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Click inside the Username field.
Click inside the Password field.
Verify the Login button can be clicked.
Verify the Back button can be clicked.
Verify the Home button can be clicked.
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page opens successfully from the Home page and all approved controls are visible, focusable, and interactive without rendering or navigation issues.

testCases.title: Verify password entry is masked during typing on the Login page
steps: Navigate from the Home page to the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Type Carwash#1 into the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks the entered password characters during input while retaining the entered value for authentication.

testCases.title: Verify successful login with approved credentials returns user to authenticated Home state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user successfully, returns to the Home page in authenticated state, displays authenticated user identity information, and displays authenticated-only feature areas.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username and password combination displays generic Failed message and keeps user unauthenticated
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button.
Enter invaliduser in the Username field.
Enter InvalidPassword1! in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, the user remains on the Login page or otherwise unauthenticated, and no authenticated-only Home page features are visible.

testCases.title: Verify blank Username and blank Password submission displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Leave the Username field empty.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and only the generic Failed message is displayed without any separate required-field validation message, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify login with Username populated and Password empty fails authentication
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no separate required-field validation message is shown, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify login with Password populated and Username empty fails authentication
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Leave the Username field empty.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no separate required-field validation message is shown, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify leading and trailing whitespace handling for valid credentials
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter two leading and trailing spaces around krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter two leading and trailing spaces around Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
Observe the resulting authentication behavior.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles leading and trailing whitespace according to implemented business behavior and the observed authentication result is consistent and stable without application errors.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only values in Username and Password fields fail authentication
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter only spaces into the Username field.
Enter only spaces into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, the user remains unauthenticated, and no dedicated required-field validation message is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns the user to the Home page without authentication
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Click the Back button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to the Home page in guest state without authenticating the user and authenticated-only features remain unavailable.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns the user to the Home page without authentication
steps: Open the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Click the Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to the Home page in guest state without authenticating the user and authenticated-only features remain unavailable.

testCases.title: Verify Login page cannot be considered authenticated after failed login attempt
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter invalid credentials into the Username and Password fields.
Click the Login button.
Return to the Home page using the Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The generic Failed message is displayed after login submission and the Home page remains in guest state without authenticated user identity or authenticated-only feature visibility.

testCases.title: Verify very long Username and Password values do not authenticate and do not break the Login page
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter a very long alphanumeric string exceeding typical username length into the Username field.
Enter a very long alphanumeric and special character string into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails safely with the generic Failed message displayed or the values are safely handled without UI corruption, crashes, or unintended authentication.

testCases.title: Verify successful authentication updates Home page from guest state to authenticated state
steps: Open the Home page and confirm guest state is visible.
Click the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
Observe the Home page after redirection.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page reloads in authenticated state with authenticated user identity visible and authenticated-only feature areas available, replacing the previous guest-only state.

testCases.title: Verify failed authentication does not expose authenticated-only UI elements
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Enter invalid credentials.
Click the Login button.
Return to the Home page if still on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The user remains unauthenticated after the failed login attempt and authenticated-only Home page features and authenticated identity indicators are not visible.
